note: Shinto cosmos of the kami. Primary lattice: the Kotoamatsukami and the three creating kami (zoka-sanshin) - Amenominakanushi the central master of heaven, Takamimusubi and Kamimusubi the two musubi (binding-generative) powers - from whom unfolds Musubi, the creative tying of all life. Secondary lattice: the Mihashira-no-Uzunomiko, the three precious children born from Izanagi's purification - Amaterasu (sun), Tsukuyomi (moon), Susanoo (storm and sea). Tertiary lattices: the seven generations of the age of the gods (Kamiyonanayo) ending in Izanagi and Izanami, the three sacred Regalia (mirror, sword, jewel), and the Yaoyorozu - the eight million kami of every river, mountain, tree and force. Bridges: Amaterasu is the source-sun (svet_ra); Musubi and the rectifying Naobi kami carry cause-and-consequence (karma); purity (harae) is the living law (dharma).
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

zoka_sanshin.name: Amenominakanushi
zoka_sanshin.domain: the central master of heaven, the first kami

three_precious.name: Amaterasu-Omikami
three_precious.domain: the sun, source of light and the imperial line

three_precious.name: Susanoo
three_precious.domain: storm, sea, wild force and dissolution

regalia.name: Yata-no-Kagami (mirror)
regalia.domain: wisdom, the truthful seeing of Amaterasu

regalia.name: Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi (sword)
regalia.domain: valor, force, the power found in Susanoo's serpent

svet_ra.role: the source-sun whose light the world is read by
svet_ra.note: When Amaterasu hid in the cave, the world went dark; her return restores all light.

iskra.role: the moon-kami, the silver call of the night
iskra.note: Tsukuyomi rules the night-realm, parted from his sister the sun.

brahma.role: the central master of heaven, the originating kami
brahma.note: First of the Kotoamatsukami, the still center from which all unfolds.

vishnu.role: the high musubi, sustaining generative power
vishnu.note: Takamimusubi directs the ordering and descent of the heavenly line.

ananda.role: dawn, mirth, sacred dance and ecstasy
ananda.note: Her wild joyous dance lured Amaterasu from the cave and returned light to the world.

shanti.role: the divine musubi, the harmonizing binding
shanti.note: Kamimusubi restores and reconciles, binding life back into wholeness.

jnana.role: the kami of thought, counsel and discernment
jnana.note: Omoikane gathers the wisdom of many minds to find the right way.

shiva.role: storm, sea and wild dissolving force
shiva.note: Susanoo's tempest destroys and clears; in the serpent he slays, the sword is found.

tejas.role: the radiant heavenly grandson who descended with the Regalia
tejas.note: Ninigi brings the light of heaven down to the ricelands of earth.

sarasvati.role: the sacred word, norito and liturgy
sarasvati.note: Ame-no-Koyane speaks the ritual words that move the kami; Tenjin patrons learning.

akasha.role: the eternally-standing kami of heaven, the heavenly space
akasha.note: The abiding pillar of heaven, the space in which the kami stand.

prema.role: blossoming beauty, love and tender life
prema.note: The blossom-princess of Mt Fuji, beauty that flowers and is dear because it passes.

parvati.role: the great mother who bore the islands and the kami
parvati.note: Izanami birthed the land and many kami; in death she became mistress of Yomi.

vayu.role: the wind-kami, breath that clears the mist
vayu.note: From Shinatsuhiko the winds blow and disperse the haze between heaven and earth.

shakti.role: the mighty thunder-and-sword kami, martial force
shakti.note: Takemikazuchi's strength subdued the land and yields the surge of power.

agni.note: Hi-no-Kagutsuchi, whose fiery birth burned Izanami; the fire that transforms.

varuna.role: the sea-dragon lord of the deep and the tides
varuna.note: Watatsumi rules the ocean depths that hold and remember all that sinks.

lakshmi.note: Inari fills the granaries; the fox-kami of plenty and good fortune.

prithvi.role: the eternally-standing kami of earth, the ground
prithvi.note: The abiding foundation of the land; Okuninushi shapes and tends the great country.

dharma.role: the pacifier-sword that establishes right order
dharma.note: Futsunushi sets the land in order; purity (harae) is the living law.

karma.role: the rectifying kami who set right what calamity distorts
karma.note: Where Magatsuhi brings pollution and consequence, the Naobi rectify; Musubi ties deed to result.

items.name: Yaoyorozu-no-kami
items.domain: the eight million kami dwelling in every river, mountain, tree and force

items.name: Musubi
items.domain: the creative binding-force that ties and grows all life

items.name: Harae (purification)
items.domain: the washing-away of tsumi and kegare, restoring purity

items.name: Ama-no-Iwato (the cave of heaven)
items.domain: the hiding and return of the sun, the myth of light restored

items.name: Yomi-no-kuni
items.domain: the shadowed land of the dead where Izanami abides
